win_condition: The game ends when the main objective is completed or a loss condition triggers; non-betrayers win only if the colony completes the main objective and they also complete their secret objective.
tiebreaker: No point tiebreaker; win/loss is objective-based. If a betrayer is present, betrayer victory is resolved by betrayer objective completion per scenario rules.

categories.label: Main Objective Completed
categories.description: Colony must complete the scenario main objective before loss conditions trigger.

categories.label: Secret Objective Completed
categories.description: Each player must satisfy their own secret objective to personally win (unless betrayer conditions apply).
